title: oldenlandia tetrangularis
intro: Oldenlandia tetrangularis, also known as Bentong root or Radix Oldenlandiae, is a perennial plant native to Southeast Asia, specifically in the tropical regions of Malaysia and Thailand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Oldenlandia tetrangularis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia tetrangularis is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
